item: ConstantExpr pointer-compare explicit unsupported family (seed_40, seed_59)
root_cause_summary: raw logs explicitly report Unsupported ConstantExpr on pointer-comparison ConstantExpr; this should be tracked as explicit unsupported/limitation, not mixed into ordinary bug counts

item: ConstantExpr pointer-compare missing-value crash family (seed_37, seed_68, seed_80)
root_cause_summary: dg mis-handles pointer-comparison-derived ConstantExpr/zext values, eventually aborting with missing value in graph; no explicit unsupported marker is emitted
